title: Adaptive Thinking vs 固定 budget_tokens：该选哪个？
title_en: Adaptive Thinking vs Fixed budget_tokens: Which to Choose?

body.itemA: Adaptive thinking（thinking.type: "adaptive"）— 推荐方式，适用于 Claude 4.6 系列
body.itemB: 固定 budget_tokens（thinking.type: "enabled"）— 已 deprecated（4.6 系列），旧模型仍需使用

dimensions.name: 配置方式
dimensions.a: 设 thinking.type 为 "adaptive"，用 effort 参数（low/medium/high）调节
dimensions.b: 设 thinking.type 为 "enabled"，手动指定 budget_tokens 数值（最小 1024）

dimensions.name: 思考行为
dimensions.a: Claude 自行判断是否思考及思考量，简单问题可能跳过思考
dimensions.b: 始终进行思考，消耗 token 直到预算用完或问题解决

dimensions.name: 最佳场景
dimensions.a: 复杂度差异大的混合任务（bimodal tasks）、长链 agentic 工作流
dimensions.b: 需要可预测延迟、精确控制思考成本的场景

dimensions.name: 模型支持
dimensions.a: 仅 Claude Opus 4.6 和 Sonnet 4.6
dimensions.b: 所有支持 extended thinking 的模型（Sonnet 4.5、Opus 4.5 等仍需此方式）

body_en.itemA: Adaptive thinking (thinking.type: "adaptive") — recommended for Claude 4.6 models
body_en.itemB: Fixed budget_tokens (thinking.type: "enabled") — deprecated on 4.6, still required for older models

dimensions.name: Configuration
dimensions.a: Set thinking.type to "adaptive", control with effort parameter (low/medium/high)
dimensions.b: Set thinking.type to "enabled", manually specify budget_tokens (min 1024)

dimensions.name: Thinking behavior
dimensions.a: Claude decides whether to think and how much; may skip thinking for simple problems
dimensions.b: Always thinks, consuming tokens up to the budget or until the problem is solved

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.b: Scenarios needing predictable latency or precise control over thinking costs

dimensions.name: Model support
dimensions.b: All extended-thinking models (Sonnet 4.5, Opus 4.5, etc. still require this)
